mapper.select: select cart.quantity from cart where book_id = #{bookId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.update: update cart set cart.quantity = #{quantity}, cart.updated_at = #{updatedAt}, cart.subtotal = #{subtotal} where book_id = #{bookId} and user_id = #{userId}
mapper.insert: insert into cart(user_id, book_id, quantity, subtotal, created_at, updated_at) values(#{userId}, #{bookId}, #{quantity}, #{subtotal}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.select: select cart.id,book_id bookId,book.title bookTitle, book.cover_url coverUrl, book.price, cart.quantity from cart inner join book where user_id = #{userId} and cart.book_id = book.id and book_id = #{bookId}
select cart.id, cart.book_id, cart.quantity, cart.subtotal, cart.created_at, book.title bookTitle, book.price, book.cover_url from cart inner join book where book_id = book.id and user_id = #{userId}
select id, user_id, book_id, quantity, subtotal, created_at, updated_at from cart where id = #{id}
mapper.delete:
delete from cart where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select id from cart where user_id = #{userId}
